title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at CEAT Tyres Capital India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at CEAT Tyres Capital India
jsonLd.description:
CEAT Tyres Capital India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About CEAT Tyres Capital India:
CEAT Tyres Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres Capital India!
